name: Maplebear Inc.
summary: Maplebear Inc. (Instacart) is a technology and enablement partner for the grocery industry. It operates Instacart Marketplace, connecting customers to over 2,200 retail banners for delivery and pickup; Instacart Enterprise Platform, powering retailers' e-commerce, fulfillment, and in-store technologies; and Instacart Ads, an advertising platform serving over 9,000 active brands using first-party transaction data. Since founding, Instacart has powered more than 1.6 billion orders and reaches over 98% of North American households.

products.name: Instacart Marketplace
products.description: Online marketplace connecting customers to retailers for grocery delivery and pickup across multiple shopping occasions.

products.name: Instacart Enterprise Platform
products.description: End-to-end technology solution for retailers covering e-commerce, fulfillment, connected stores, ads, marketing, and insights.

products.name: Instacart Ads
products.description: Digital advertising platform for brands using first-party transaction data to drive product discovery and purchases.

products.name: Instacart+
products.description: Membership program offering unlimited $0 delivery fees on qualifying orders and other exclusive customer benefits.

products.name: Caper Carts
products.description: AI-powered smart shopping carts enabling a connected in-store experience for retailers.

products.name: Carrot Tags
products.description: In-store technology solution for retailers to support seamless online and in-store operations.

products.name: Eversight
products.description: Pricing and promotions optimization technology offered as part of Connected Stores.

products.name: FoodStorm
products.description: Order management technology for retailers included in the Connected Stores suite.

products.name: Carrot Ads
products.description: Enterprise ads offering bringing Instacart Ads capabilities to retailers' own storefronts and apps.

products.name: Storefront
products.description: E-commerce storefront technology powering more than 380 grocers' e-commerce sites.
